channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: J. Cole @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-30 03:00 → 2026-08-31 03:00 — J. Cole at Oakland Arena. J. Cole's tour is highly anticipated, and his ability to connect with fans live is well-documented.

item.title: Willow Avalon @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-08-03 03:00 — Willow Avalon at August Hall. Oliver Tree's unique style and engaging performances have garnered a dedicated following, making this a standout show.

item.title: YOASOBI @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-15 03:00 — YOASOBI at Oakland Arena. YOASOBI is known for their captivating live shows and innovative music, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: Eagles of Death Metal @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Eagles of Death Metal at The Fillmore. Eagles of Death Metal's energetic performances and cult following make this a noteworthy event.

item.title: Sarah McLachlan @ Toyota Pavilion at Concord
item.description: 2026-08-02 02:00 — Sarah McLachlan at Toyota Pavilion at Concord. Sarah McLachlan's emotive performances and legacy in music make this a compelling show.

item.title: WOODZ @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-07-28 02:30 — WOODZ at San Jose Civic. WOODZ is gaining traction in the U.S. and his live shows are expected to be dynamic and engaging.

item.title: Muse @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-28 02:00 — Muse at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Godsmack's reputation for powerful live performances makes this a significant event for rock fans.

item.title: Lil Wayne @ Toyota Pavilion at Concord
item.description: 2026-08-01 02:00 — Lil Wayne at Toyota Pavilion at Concord. Lil Wayne's legacy and the star power of his collaborators make this a highly anticipated concert.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band is known for their exceptional musicianship and live shows, appealing to blues and rock fans.

item.title: Shpongle @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-11-01 03:00 — Shpongle at Fox Theater - Oakland. Shpongle's unique blend of electronic and world music creates a mesmerizing live experience.

item.title: Chris Travis @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-07-23 03:00 — Chris Travis at August Hall. Chris Travis is an emerging artist in the hip-hop scene, and his live performances are gaining attention.

item.title: The Fixx @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-08-02 03:00 — The Fixx at The Castro Theatre. The Fixx offers a nostalgic experience for fans of 80s new wave music, making this a fun event.

item.title: Yeat @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-08-14 02:00 — Yeat at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Yeat's growing popularity and energetic performances make this a noteworthy hip-hop event.

item.title: Morris Day and the Time @ Blue Note Napa Summer Sessions
item.description: 2026-08-22 02:00 — Morris Day and the Time at Blue Note Napa Summer Sessions. The Head And The Heart's folk-rock sound resonates well with live audiences, promising a heartfelt performance.

item.title: Social Distortion @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-30 02:00 — Social Distortion at Fox Theater - Oakland. Social Distortion's punk rock legacy and energetic shows make this a significant event for fans.

item.title: Slayyyter @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-10 03:00 — Slayyyter at Fox Theater - Oakland. Slayyyter's unique pop sound and engaging performances are attracting a growing fanbase.
